platform_note: Prepared as a generic structured upload package for a 54-country Africa buildout because a public WASI/ASI Intelligence import schema could not be verified.

fund_identity.full_name: Central African Republic Raw Export Index Fund
fund_identity.benchmark_name: Central African Republic Raw Export Index

fund_family.shared_family_rule: Each country fund keeps its own export methodology while staying aligned to a continent-wide naming, governance, and packaging structure.
fund_family.comparison_currency_note: Publish the country in XAF, allow regional comparison in XAF, and publish a continent-wide comparison series in USD.

investment_objective.primary_objective: Track the evolution of the main raw materials exported from Central African Republic through a transparent, rules-based benchmark.
investment_objective.family_objective: Enable continent-wide comparison inside AFEX while preserving country-specific export logic.

benchmark_methodology.index_name: Central African Republic Raw Export Index
benchmark_methodology.transport_basis_note: Use outbound export tonnage across road, rail, air, border-post, and transit-corridor flows rather than seaborne loading.

country_context.special_note: Central African Republic should be modeled with landlocked corridor logic and a strong governance-risk caution.

research_and_validation.caution: This all-54 library is a scalable continental starter set. Official country trade statistics, benchmark rules, and legal review should be completed before institutional launch.

regulatory_positioning.generic_note: Country-specific legal and securities review is required before launch. Do not assume one regulatory regime applies across all 54 sovereign states.
regulatory_positioning.microfinance_separation_note: The fund vehicle should remain separate from any microfinance balance sheet.
